positive: A breathtaking, highly stylized depiction of a mythical forest guardian (a sleek wolf or fox) emerging from bioluminescent foliage. The style must be a modern etching/vintage linocut illustration, featuring bold, clean silhouettes and intricate detail work within defined lines. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, utilizing strong negative space and high contrast to maximize print quality on apparel. Color palette should be deep indigo, emerald green, and vibrant gold accents, evoking a sense of magic and wilderness. Highly detailed, suitable for screen printing, maximum contrast, clean edges.
negative: blurry, low quality, amateur, grainy, fuzzy, watermarks, text, signature, watermark, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, extra fingers, noise, cartoon, sketch, monochrome, realism, 3d render, oil paint
